data.title: Server Distribution
data.description: Google deploys a vast network of servers distributed globally to handle requests efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Load balancing across multiple data centers for scalability and redundancy.

data.title: Monolithic and Microservices Hybrid
data.description: Utilizes both monolithic architecture and microservices to optimize performance.
data.technical_spec: Front-end monolith integrated with scalable back-end microservices.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Ensures maximum uptime through redundant systems and failover protocols.
data.technical_spec: 95%+ uptime SLA with automatic failover and disaster recovery systems.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Employs a CDN for faster content delivery worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Geo-distributed CDN using edge caches to minimize latency.

data.title: Scalable Databases
data.description: Uses distributed databases to handle massive amounts of data.
data.technical_spec: Google Spanner and Bigtable for real-time data scalability.
